summary: Canonical local registry for Frankly local OS and Lab surfaces, gate state, QA evidence and remaining approvals. 4.0 (2026-07-10): the cockpit is registered as the ONE operating surface; retired v3 pages left the registry (files stay on disk); the two dead blog/ paths now point at journal/. Uploadable website bundles stay allowlisted and separate.

surfaces.name: Start / onboarding
surfaces.nextApproval: Decide sitemap/robots behavior before public use.

surfaces.nextApproval: Stays a local operating surface served by cockpit-server.py on 127.0.0.1:8137; any public use requires Jonas approval.
